tasks.title: Design a Digital Dreamscape biome
tasks.objective: Create one kid-friendly biome concept (name, mood, 3 landmarks, 1 mini-quest) for Digital Dreamscape explore mode.
tasks.kid_instructions: Pick a mood (cosy, spooky, neon, underwater). Sketch or describe 3 places a player would visit. Write one short quest a friend could finish in 5 minutes.

agent_prompt_template.PROJECT: Digital Dreamscape — kid-safe explore game at digitaldreamscape.site
agent_prompt_template.TASK: Design a biome concept pack from kid notes
agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Turn kid biome notes into a structured JSON snippet: name, mood, landmarks[], mini_quest{title, steps[], reward}
agent_prompt_template.RULES: Public-safe only. No API keys. No scary/violent content. Reading level grade 4–6.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Read kid_summary and agent_result fields; output valid JSON only.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: JSON parses; 3 landmarks; mini_quest has 2–4 steps; reward is kid-friendly.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Paste JSON into work log agent_result; set status ready_for_review.

tasks.title: Draw your agent trading card
tasks.objective: Design a trading card for your personal agent avatar with name, power, and weakness.
tasks.kid_instructions: Draw on paper or tablet. Include: agent name, one superpower, one silly weakness, favorite color.

agent_prompt_template.TASK: Describe trading card from kid artwork notes
agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Produce card text: name, power, weakness, flavor_line (one sentence)
agent_prompt_template.RULES: Kid-safe humor only. No personal info (school, address).
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Use kid_summary as source; write card copy markdown.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: All four fields present; under 120 words total.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Save copy to agent_result; kid moves task to Ready for Review.

tasks.title: Write a 3-sentence project update
tasks.objective: Draft a short public-safe update about something you built or learned this week.
tasks.kid_instructions: Three sentences: what you did, what was hard, what is next. Ask a parent before sharing names.

agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Edit kid draft to 3 clear sentences; keep kid voice; public-safe.
agent_prompt_template.RULES: No last names, locations, or contact info. No secrets.

tasks.title: Plan a Spark side-quest
tasks.objective: Outline a small side-quest for Spark Meridian City (trigger, 3 beats, reward).
tasks.kid_instructions: Parked until parent approves. When unlocked: name an NPC, what they need, and what the player earns.

agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Convert outline to mission.template.json fields: title, trigger, beats[], reward
agent_prompt_template.RULES: Age-appropriate; no combat gore; parent_approved must be true before claim.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Expand kid notes into mission JSON skeleton.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: 3 beats; reward specified; trigger is clear.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Hand JSON to parent for review.
